name: Dear PyGui (Fast Python GUI Framework)

performance.notes: GPU-accelerated via Dear ImGui; 60fps native; C++ backend

agent_readiness.notes: Fast Python GUI based on Dear ImGui. Immediate mode GUI (not widget-tree). dpg.add_window(), dpg.add_button(), dpg.add_plot(). GPU-accelerated rendering. Real-time data visualization (live charts, 2D/3D plots). Node editor for visual programming. Custom themes. No web technologies required (unlike Electron/Tauri). Better than Tkinter for performance-critical tools. Popular for trading dashboards, data visualization tools, ML training monitors. Not for native-feel apps (ImGui style).

gotchas: Immediate mode paradigm differs from widget-tree GUIs
Not suitable for native-look-and-feel apps (ImGui aesthetic)
Cross-platform but may have rendering differences
Documentation can be sparse for advanced features
best_when: Data visualization and monitoring dashboards in Python
ML training monitors and real-time plotting
Tools where ImGui's distinctive style is acceptable
summary: Dear PyGui is a GPU-accelerated Python GUI framework based on Dear ImGui. Immediate mode paradigm — add_window, add_button, add_plot. Real-time charts and data visualization. Node editor for visual programming. C++ backend with Python bindings. Best for data dashboards, ML training monitors, and performance-critical Python desktop tools where ImGui's style is acceptable. Not for native-look applications.
